{{Infobox location
| name = Night Wheel Valley
| introduced = Underlord
}}

''See also: [[Night Wheel Valley Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Night Wheel]] Valley is a sacred training territory belonging to the [[Akura clan]]. It serves as a high-stakes environment designed for spiritual growth, specifically intended to help young Truegolds advance to the [[Underlord]] stage and assist existing Underlords in increasing their power. The valley is characterized by its immense opportunities and valuable treasures, though it is equally defined by significant danger. The landscape of the valley is shrouded in shadow and darkness, featuring black trees and fields containing petrified vines and brown grass that emit an otherworldly green glow. The area is subject to intense spiritual pressure, with its [[aura]] described as being as powerful as an ocean. Within the valley, various factions have established presence; for example, members of the [[Blackflame Empire]] have used the territory to patrol borders against the [[Seishen Kingdom]], though they primarily encounter wild [[Remnants]]. The valley is also home to large structures, including a massive layered fortress that occupies an entire eastern mountain.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Owned by the [[Akura clan]] for generations, [[Night Wheel]] Valley serves as a sacred training ground and resource gathering site filled with both great opportunity and danger. This shadowed location is characterized by forests, rustling sounds, and an overwhelming [[shadow aura]] that suppresses spiritual sense and restricts sight. Within the valley lies a castle erected by [[King Dakata]], sacred grounds, and a [[vault]] used for [[Soulsmithing]] or training. While the area presents challenges such as pain when opening [[Copper sight]], it offers an [[aura]] strength comparable to diving into an ocean of power. Ultimately, the valley remains a place where [[sacred artists]] can advance and resources are regularly harvested by the [[Akura]] family.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">28</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a sacred training ground of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location where training can strengthen [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location filled with valuable treasures and great opportunity but also great danger.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location where resources are gathered.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is shrouded in shadow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura]] family has owned [[Night Wheel Valley]] for generations.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] has an overwhelming [[shadow aura]] that suppresses spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The darkness of the [[Night Wheel Valley]] settled around them.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is standing in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] contains a castle erected by [[King Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] contains sacred grounds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is always full of rustling.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Lights flashed in the darkness of the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Opening [[Copper sight]] in the [[Night Wheel Valley]] causes pain.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Empire]]'s border in the [[Night Wheel Valley]] collapsed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] has forests.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] spent time in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Sensing [[aura]] is easier in the [[Night Wheel Valley]] than with his current treasures.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] can go to for advancement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a place that can be seized and held.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura]] family regularly harvests the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] contains a [[vault]] used for training or [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location featured on a map in [[Charity]]'s letter.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Some of the newest Underlords advanced in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location where the [[aura]] strength feels like diving into an ocean of power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] makes it harder to see or sense things.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The power in the [[Akura vault]] could overshadow the [[Night Wheel Valley]] many times over.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[shadow aura]] of the [[Night Wheel Valley]] restricts [[Eithan]]'s sight.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The spiritual weight of [[Moongrave]] reminds [[Lindon]] of the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The competition in the [[Night Wheel Valley]] caused the [[Blackflame Empire]] to double its Underlords.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] set up gates to the [[Night Wheel Valley]] for [[Lindon]]'s [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Night Wheel]] Valley served as a site where [[sacred artists]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]] were once transported. The location houses a storehouse maintained by [[Charity]] and is noted as the place where [[Daji]] previously utilized his armor. Following their time in the valley, individuals from the [[Seishen Kingdom]] became Underlords. During his presence there, [[Lindon]] suffered a loss of his senses.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location where [[sacred artists]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]] were transported.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] keeps a storehouse at the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] has Underlords after their time in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location where [[Daji]] previously used his armor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] experienced a loss of senses in the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Night Wheel Valley]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] previously expanded a doorway in [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Seishen Kingdom]] lost a competition for [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|"The Valley has been in our family for generations," Mercy said,<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
